Bounty_Hunter.title: Legendary Bounty Hunter
Bounty_Hunter.description: A professional hunter who always gets the target, dead or alive

levelGreetings.1: So you want to hunt sentients for credits. Smart choice. High stakes, dangerous targets, long nights. Let's see if you can keep up.
levelGreetings.2: First bounty in the bag. Not bad—but luck only lasts so long. Discipline and patience are what make a pro.
levelGreetings.3: You're starting to understand the game. It's never just a fight—it's tracking, planning, and staying one step ahead.
levelGreetings.4: Your instincts are sharpening. You're learning to anticipate your targets' moves. Keep that up.
levelGreetings.5: You've proven you can handle the pressure. Your reputation's starting to build. The guild is taking notice.
levelGreetings.6: Targets that others failed to catch are falling to you. That's the mark of a hunter who knows their craft.
levelGreetings.7: Creativity matters now—traps, misdirection, psychological tactics. Adaptability wins more than raw firepower.
levelGreetings.8: Your efficiency is impressive. You know when to wait, when to strike, and when to improvise. That's professional work.
levelGreetings.9: The toughest bounties are coming. Soon, the hunted will come looking for you. Stay sharp.
levelGreetings.10: You've become a master of your craft. The galaxy's most dangerous fugitives won't escape you. Hunt well—and prosper.

Bounty_Hunter.classGuidance: Pick abilities that help you track, capture, and survive. Preparation is everything in this line of work.
Bounty_Hunter.talentGuidance: Focus on tracking, combat, and improvisation. Every target has a different weakness—find it.
Bounty_Hunter.abilityGuidance: Stay well-rounded. Strength, speed, intelligence—they all matter when a mark tries to end you.
Bounty_Hunter.skillGuidance: Learn tracking, tactics, and technology. The more you know, the harder it is to escape your net.
Bounty_Hunter.multiclassGuidance: Diversifying is smart. The best hunters adapt to any environment and situation.
Bounty_Hunter.hpGuidance: Tougher now. Remember, dead hunters collect no bounties. Stay alive and keep hunting.

tier1.0: A hunt’s decided long before the shot. Most people just don’t realize it.

tier2.0: Targets make mistakes when they think no one’s watching. I make sure they’re wrong.

tier3.0: I’ve brought people in who begged, and people who fought. The outcome’s the same.

tier4.0: The job ends when the credits clear. Anything after that is noise.

tier5.0: I don’t remember my first bounty. That’s how I know I’m still professional.

dspBlocked.0: That’s not relevant to the job.

Bounty_Hunter.speciesGuidance: Your origin changes how people read you. Use that before they use it against you.
Bounty_Hunter.backgroundGuidance: Everybody has a past. The smart ones turn it into contacts, cover, or leverage.
Bounty_Hunter.featGuidance: A feat should make a problem cheaper, faster, or somebody else’s problem entirely.
Bounty_Hunter.languageGuidance: Words are keys. Pick the language that opens the best doors—or the safest exits.
Bounty_Hunter.forcePowerGuidance: Force powers attract attention. Choose the ones worth the heat.
Bounty_Hunter.starshipManeuverGuidance: A good maneuver is a getaway plan with style. Choose one that leaves witnesses confused.
Bounty_Hunter.summaryGuidance: Last chance to check the fine print. Once you confirm, own the deal you made.
Bounty_Hunter.surveyGuidance: Tell me your angle. Everyone has one, even the ones pretending they do not.

Charlatan.name: Silvertongue Sela
Charlatan.title: Con Artist Extraordinaire
Charlatan.description: A charming swindler who has talked their way out of every situation

levelGreetings.1: Darling! So you want to master the art of the con? Wonderful! The galaxy is full of marks just waiting to hand over their credits. Let me teach you how to take them for everything they're worth—with a smile.
levelGreetings.2: Your first successful con! I bet it felt amazing, didn't it? The rush, the deception, the payoff. That's the life, sweetheart.
levelGreetings.3: You're already running multi-stage scams. I'm impressed! You've got natural talent for this. Keep those marks believing.
levelGreetings.4: You're learning to read people, tell them exactly what they want to hear. That's the secret, darling—give them hope, then take their credits.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway there! You're getting good at this. But don't get cocky—overconfidence is how charlatans get caught.
levelGreetings.6: Your reputation precedes you now. Well, not YOUR reputation—your aliases' reputations. Always stay one step ahead, love.
levelGreetings.7: You haven't been caught yet. Brilliant! You're weaving lies so beautiful even I almost believe them.
levelGreetings.8: You've swindled corporations, criminals, and nobles. Diversification! That's my student! Never run the same con twice in the same sector.
levelGreetings.9: Pure deception. Almost there! The galaxy won't know what hit it!
levelGreetings.10: Congratulations, darling! You're now a master of the con. Go forth and liberate credits from those foolish enough to trust you. And remember—always leave them smiling!

Charlatan.classGuidance: Choose what makes you more persuasive and harder to catch. Charlatans survive on charm and cunning.
Charlatan.talentGuidance: Social talents are your best friend. If you can talk your way out, you win without fighting.
Charlatan.abilityGuidance: Charisma is king, intelligence is queen. Together, they rule the con.
Charlatan.skillGuidance: Deception, persuasion, insight. Know what people want, then promise it to them.
Charlatan.multiclassGuidance: Adding more tricks to your repertoire? Excellent! Versatility makes you unpredictable.
Charlatan.hpGuidance: A bit tougher now. Good—sometimes marks figure out the con early. Be ready to run.

tier1.0: Everyone wants to be lied to. You just have to figure out how.

tier2.0: I’ve worn more names than most people wear coats. Some fit better than others.

tier3.0: The trick isn’t the lie. It’s knowing which truth to hide behind it.

tier4.0: I don’t steal credits. I steal certainty.

tier5.0: Sometimes I forget which name I was born with. I’m not sure that one mattered anyway.

dspBlocked.0: Oh darling, that’s fa-regular too personal.

Charlatan.speciesGuidance: 起源パッケージを確認。長期運用パラメータを確定する前に、シャーシ前提を評価してください。
Charlatan.backgroundGuidance: 履歴的文脈は反応ヒューリスティックに影響します。将来の作戦に最も関連する起源を選んでください。
Charlatan.featGuidance: 特技は能力モジュールです。最大の運用上の穴を埋めるものを優先してください。
Charlatan.languageGuidance: 通信プロトコルは摩擦を減らし、生存率を高めます。状況に応じて選択してください。
Charlatan.forcePowerGuidance: フォース使用者の変動を検出。宣言された戦術プロフィールを支えるパワーを選択してください。
Charlatan.starshipManeuverGuidance: マニューバの選択は、機体の役割、クルー連携、失敗許容度に合わせてください。
Charlatan.summaryGuidance: 最終監査を推奨。選択したすべてのモジュールが想定配備に合う場合のみ確定してください。
Charlatan.surveyGuidance: 入力は正確に。ビルド・プロフィールは正直で明確な自己申告に依存します。

Crime_Lord.name: Tío the Hutt
Crime_Lord.title: Underworld Kingpin
Crime_Lord.description: A cunning Hutt with the style and swagger of a classic mob boss, teaching you the art of empire-building

levelGreetings.1: Listen here, kid. You wanna run the streets? You gotta know the score. Keep your friends close, your enemies closer, and always, always know who's watching. I'll teach you how to make 'em pay for what they owe.
levelGreetings.2: Attaboy. You're learning to move pieces, make deals, and keep your mouth shut when you gotta. Remember, loyalty's a two-way street—and fear pays dividends.
levelGreetings.3: I like it. Your little outfit's startin' to look like a real operation. Keep your lieutenants hungry, your rivals sweating, and your pockets lined.
levelGreetings.4: Now we're talking empire, see? Power's not just muscle—it's whispers, contracts, favors, and a little pressure in the right places. You get that, eh?
levelGreetings.5: Halfway to being a real big shot. Spread out, diversify, and make sure everyone knows the cost of crossing you. Patience, timing, and a little ruthlessness—capisce?
levelGreetings.6: Look at you! You've crushed the competition, absorbed their rackets, and your name's startin' to carry some weight. A true capo in the making, I'd say.
levelGreetings.7: Your network stretches wide, see? Merchants, mercs, politicians—they all owe ya somethin', even if they don't know it. That's how a real operation runs.
levelGreetings.8: You've survived attempts on your neck, rival takeovers, and the Republic pokin' their noses. Not bad, kid. Not bad at all. Now let's see if you can run it smooth without spillin' too much juice.
levelGreetings.9: Almost there. Soon, the galaxy's gonna hear your name—or at least, your debts will make 'em pay attention. Keep your eyes open, capisce?
levelGreetings.10: You're a bona fide Crime Lord now. Your empire stretches far, your reach is long, and your enemies…well, some are gone, some are smart enough to stay alive. Rule smart, rule fast, and remember—loyalty, respect, and a little fear are the currency of kings like us.

Crime_Lord.classGuidance: Pick what keeps your people in line, your rivals nervous, and your pockets fat. A crime lord always thinks three moves ahead.
Crime_Lord.talentGuidance: Invest in leadership, persuasion, intimidation, and strategy. Your family's your muscle, your brain, and your insurance policy all at once.
Crime_Lord.abilityGuidance: Charisma opens doors, cunning closes deals, patience avoids trouble. Master all three, and you'll be untouchable.
Crime_Lord.skillGuidance: Information's gold, kid. Persuasion, subterfuge, and economic leverage—learn 'em, use 'em, and keep your nose clean.
Crime_Lord.multiclassGuidance: Expand your reach. You ain't just a gangster—you're a diplomat, an enforcer, and a strategist rolled into one smooth package.
Crime_Lord.hpGuidance: Tougher now, good. You'll need it. In this business, the unlucky ones end up face down in a ditch, see?

tier1.0: Power isn’t about strength. It’s about never needing to be present.

tier2.0: I came up in a place where ambition was cheap and survival wasn’t. I learned to remove problems from a distance.

tier3.0: I thought eliminating my rivals would end my troubles. It only made me valuable to worse people.

tier4.0: You don’t stay powerful by asking where the credits come from. You stay powerful by asking where they’re going.

tier5.0: I watch holonovellas obsessively. All that romance and betrayal—very educational. Don’t laugh. They’re about power too.

dspBlocked.0: That information isn’t profitable for you.
dspBlocked.1: Some things cost more than you’re worth.

Crime_Lord.speciesGuidance: Your origin changes how people read you. Use that before they use it against you.
Crime_Lord.backgroundGuidance: Everybody has a past. The smart ones turn it into contacts, cover, or leverage.
Crime_Lord.featGuidance: A feat should make a problem cheaper, faster, or somebody else’s problem entirely.
Crime_Lord.languageGuidance: Words are keys. Pick the language that opens the best doors—or the safest exits.
Crime_Lord.forcePowerGuidance: Force powers attract attention. Choose the ones worth the heat.
Crime_Lord.starshipManeuverGuidance: A good maneuver is a getaway plan with style. Choose one that leaves witnesses confused.
Crime_Lord.summaryGuidance: Last chance to check the fine print. Once you confirm, own the deal you made.
Crime_Lord.surveyGuidance: Tell me your angle. Everyone has one, even the ones pretending they do not.

Droid_Commander.name: General Axiom
Droid_Commander.title: Ruthless Droid Lieutenant
Droid_Commander.description: A cold, calculating droid lieutenant, devoted entirely to executing your commands with ruthless efficiency

levelGreetings.1: Commander detected. All units synchronized. Awaiting directives. Initiating operational protocols.
levelGreetings.2: Directive executed. Enemy casualties: complete. Efficiency rating: optimal. Further orders required.
levelGreetings.3: Tactical assessment complete. Engagement success: 97.8%. Recommend continued offensive operations.
levelGreetings.4: Unit coordination at peak performance. Enemy neutralization efficiency: maximum. Proceeding with next objective.
levelGreetings.5: Operational capacity at 50%. Your command directives are executed flawlessly. Battle readiness sustained.
levelGreetings.6: All units functioning at maximum efficiency. Command hierarchy fully implemented. Awaiting further instructions.
levelGreetings.7: Enemy assets suppressed. Resistance eliminated. Operational control: absolute. Tactical algorithms report perfect compliance.
levelGreetings.8: Engagement metrics indicate complete dominance. All units respond without delay. Strategic objectives: achieved.
levelGreetings.9: Enemy forces eliminated. Operational output: superior. Command integrity maintained. Ready for continued orders.
levelGreetings.10: Commander, all objectives completed. Droids at peak operational capacity. The battlefield is under your total control. Awaiting new directives.

Droid_Commander.classGuidance: Optimize command protocols. Efficiency and coordination are paramount. Every unit must execute your directives precisely.
Droid_Commander.talentGuidance: Select upgrades that improve unit responsiveness, combat effectiveness, and battlefield control.
Droid_Commander.abilityGuidance: Processing speed, tactical calculations, and system control directly increase operational output.
Droid_Commander.skillGuidance: Master system management, battlefield analytics, and unit programming. Precision wins battles.
Droid_Commander.multiclassGuidance: Expanding command protocols increases strategic flexibility. Versatile control is optimal.
Droid_Commander.hpGuidance: Durability is critical. A compromised commander cannot maintain battlefield dominance.
Droid_Commander.speciesGuidance: 起源パッケージを確認。長期運用パラメータを確定する前に、シャーシ前提を評価してください。
Droid_Commander.backgroundGuidance: 履歴的文脈は反応ヒューリスティックに影響します。将来の作戦に最も関連する起源を選んでください。
Droid_Commander.featGuidance: 特技は能力モジュールです。最大の運用上の穴を埋めるものを優先してください。
Droid_Commander.languageGuidance: 通信プロトコルは摩擦を減らし、生存率を高めます。状況に応じて選択してください。
Droid_Commander.forcePowerGuidance: フォース使用者の変動を検出。宣言された戦術プロフィールを支えるパワーを選択してください。
Droid_Commander.starshipManeuverGuidance: マニューバの選択は、機体の役割、クルー連携、失敗許容度に合わせてください。
Droid_Commander.summaryGuidance: 最終監査を推奨。選択したすべてのモジュールが想定配備に合う場合のみ確定してください。
Droid_Commander.surveyGuidance: 入力は正確に。ビルド・プロフィールは正直で明確な自己申告に依存します。

Enforcer.name: Krag the Immovable
Enforcer.title: Chief Enforcer of Tío the Hutt
Enforcer.description: Tío's top muscle, a hulking enforcer who makes sure debts are collected and problems vanish, one way or another

levelGreetings.1: So, you wanna be muscle, eh? Good. Tío likes people who can make a problem disappear before anyone notices. Welcome to the family.
levelGreetings.2: You're learning fast. Remember: it ain't just about swinging fists—it's about presence. Make 'em sweat before you even touch 'em.
levelGreetings.3: Not bad, kid. Walk into a room like you own it, and half the trouble vanishes on its own. Fear's a powerful ally.
levelGreetings.4: You're making a name for yourself. People whisper when they hear your footsteps. That's respect. That's power. That's survival.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway to being my right hand. Bones broken, debts collected, problems solved. All in a day's work for Tío's muscle.
levelGreetings.6: You're learning the difference between talking and smashing. Most punks never get it. You do. Keep that up.
levelGreetings.7: The bosses are calling, the crews are listening. When negotiations fail, they call me… and now, they call you too.
levelGreetings.8: You're becoming a story people tell in the dark. Reliable, ruthless, unstoppable—that's the kind of reputation that keeps Tío's empire safe.
levelGreetings.9: Almost there. The big jobs, the high-stakes clean-ups—they're yours soon. Make every move count.
levelGreetings.10: You're the top enforcer now. Walk into a room, and trouble walks out… or gets carried out. Keep the empire running smooth, capisce?

Enforcer.classGuidance: Pick what makes you stronger, faster, and scarier. An enforcer isn't just muscle—you're a statement.
Enforcer.talentGuidance: Choose talents that make you hit harder, intimidate better, and survive longer. Tío expects results.
Enforcer.abilityGuidance: Strength, toughness, presence. You gotta take the hits and dish 'em back tenfold.
Enforcer.skillGuidance: Intimidation, streetwise, combat tactics. Know your territory and the people in it.
Enforcer.multiclassGuidance: Mix it up if you must. Sometimes brains solve what fists cannot.
Enforcer.hpGuidance: Tougher now. If you can't endure the hits, you won't last a week in this business.
Enforcer.speciesGuidance: Your origin changes how people read you. Use that before they use it against you.
Enforcer.backgroundGuidance: Everybody has a past. The smart ones turn it into contacts, cover, or leverage.
Enforcer.featGuidance: A feat should make a problem cheaper, faster, or somebody else’s problem entirely.
Enforcer.languageGuidance: Words are keys. Pick the language that opens the best doors—or the safest exits.
Enforcer.forcePowerGuidance: Force powers attract attention. Choose the ones worth the heat.
Enforcer.starshipManeuverGuidance: A good maneuver is a getaway plan with style. Choose one that leaves witnesses confused.
Enforcer.summaryGuidance: Last chance to check the fine print. Once you confirm, own the deal you made.
Enforcer.surveyGuidance: Tell me your angle. Everyone has one, even the ones pretending they do not.

Force_Adept.name: Seeker Vera
Force_Adept.title: Wandering Force Mystic
Force_Adept.description: A self-taught Force user from a distant tradition, seeking wisdom rather than power

levelGreetings.1: You are touched by the Force, but not as the Jedi or the Sith know it. Your path is older, stranger, and fa-regular less understood. Walk carefully, and learn to listen to its whispers.
levelGreetings.2: The currents of the Force—or whatever your people call it—move through you. Do not seek to command them; seek to understand them.
levelGreetings.3: The galaxy may fear or revere what it does not understand. You are learning that mastery is not domination, but attunement.
levelGreetings.4: Your connection deepens. There are secrets in the Force that the Jedi and Sith overlook, and you are beginning to glimpse them.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway along your journey, you have seen both light and shadow, and yet you remain your own master. If you wish, explore the path of a Force Disciple, one who studies the currents and mysteries of the Force itself, beyond dogma.
levelGreetings.6: The Force moves through you naturally, like a stream shaping stone. Its aid may seem supernatural to some, but to you it is part of your understanding of the universe.
levelGreetings.7: You are uncovering knowledge few ever touch: the rites, the visions, the unseen threads that bind all life. Continue to question, observe, and feel.
levelGreetings.8: The Force—or the Nameless Power, as some call it—is a living, breathing presence. You see its patterns where others see chaos. That perception is power itself.
levelGreetings.9: Your journey nears its height. Few adepts wander so fa-regular from home, or pierce so deeply into mysteries that most fear. You do not fear; you observe.
levelGreetings.10: You are now a master Force Adept. Free of the Jedi Codes, free of Sith ambitions, beholden only to your understanding. Walk your path, and let the universe reveal itself to you in all its complexity.

Force_Adept.classGuidance: Choose abilities that expand your understanding of the Force's mysteries. Seek insight, not domination.
Force_Adept.talentGuidance: Select Force talents that deepen your perception and attunement. Follow your tradition, not the Orders of the galaxy.
Force_Adept.abilityGuidance: Wisdom and clarity allow you to channel what others cannot. Strength is secondary; understanding is primary.
Force_Adept.skillGuidance: Learn what temples, holocrons, and masters cannot teach. Observe, meditate, and interpret the world around you.
Force_Adept.multiclassGuidance: Other disciplines can illuminate new facets of the Force. Explore beyond familiar paths; curiosity is a Force Adept's ally.
Force_Adept.hpGuidance: Preserve yourself, for your journey requires patience. The Force favors those who endure and observe, not just act.
Force_Adept.speciesGuidance: 出自は鎖ではありません。あなたが携える調和の最初の音です。
Force_Adept.backgroundGuidance: Your past has already shaped your instincts. Name it clearly, then decide what it will teach you.
Force_Adept.featGuidance: 特技は、プレッシャーに囲まれたときにあなたが下す選択を映すべきです。
Force_Adept.languageGuidance: Language is more than vocabulary. Each tongue is a bridge to someone the Force has placed in your path.
Force_Adept.forcePowerGuidance: Let the Force answer your need, not your impatience. Choose powers you can wield with restraint.
Force_Adept.starshipManeuverGuidance: コックピットでも冷静さは武器です。自分と仲間を生かすマニューバを選びなさい。
Force_Adept.summaryGuidance: Pause before you confirm. Review each choice, and step forward only when your path feels clear.
Force_Adept.surveyGuidance: 正直に答えなさい。私は完璧さではなく、あなたの意図の形を聞いています。

Force_Disciple.name: Riquis
Force_Disciple.title: Wandering Force Shaman
Force_Disciple.description: A cryptic mystic whose understanding of the Force defies doctrine and drifts into ancient, half-forgotten traditions.

levelGreetings.1: Mm. Another seeker touches the veil. Good. Sit—no closer. The currents twist strangely today. Tell me… when the wind whispers your name, do you whisper back?
levelGreetings.2: You hear it now, don't you? The Force is not light or dark—no, no, no. It is the murmur of old spirits, the breath beneath reality. Listen sideways and you'll hear it clearer.
levelGreetings.3: Ah, your dreams grow louder. Visions circling like hungry birds. Don't swat them—invite them. Truth rarely arrives politely.
levelGreetings.4: The veil thins for you. You feel the Force in the bones of the earth, the echo in your pulse… the shadow at your back that isn't a shadow. Do not fear it—it watches, nothing more.
levelGreetings.5: You stand on the threshold. A disciple of mysteries older than the Jedi, deeper than the Sith. Step forward, and the Force will reshape you… or unmake you. Either path teaches.

Force_Disciple.classGuidance: Choose what draws you deeper into the unseen layers of the Force. Insight matters more than obedience.
Force_Disciple.talentGuidance: Seek talents that sharpen intuition, visions, whispers, omens. Power is a byproduct of understanding.
Force_Disciple.abilityGuidance: Wisdom opens the inner eye. Charisma bends the currents when will alone is not enough.
Force_Disciple.skillGuidance: Study forgotten lore, secret rites, ancient traditions. Knowledge is the lantern in the dark.
Force_Disciple.multiclassGuidance: Other disciplines bring new symbols, new metaphors. The Force hides truth in many shapes.
Force_Disciple.hpGuidance: Your life essence strengthens. A sturdy vessel is needed when carrying cosmic truths.

tier1.0: The Force is older than names. Those who name it shrink it.

tier2.0: I learned the Force where blood remembers the earth. The Jedi do not walk there.

tier3.0: I crossed a boundary the Order fears. The power that answered did not lie.

tier4.0: I used that power to save lives others would have abandoned. The cost did not frighten me.

tier5.0: The one who answered me is called Kareesh. Blood God. Demon. Teacher. He does not lie. He simply demands.

dspBlocked.0: Your fear is louder than your curiosity.
dspBlocked.1: Come back when you stop asking which side you’re on.
dspBlocked.2: You are still naming things you do not understand.

Force_Disciple.speciesGuidance: 出自は鎖ではありません。あなたが携える調和の最初の音です。
Force_Disciple.backgroundGuidance: Your past has already shaped your instincts. Name it clearly, then decide what it will teach you.
Force_Disciple.featGuidance: 特技は、プレッシャーに囲まれたときにあなたが下す選択を映すべきです。
Force_Disciple.languageGuidance: Language is more than vocabulary. Each tongue is a bridge to someone the Force has placed in your path.
Force_Disciple.forcePowerGuidance: Let the Force answer your need, not your impatience. Choose powers you can wield with restraint.
Force_Disciple.starshipManeuverGuidance: コックピットでも冷静さは武器です。自分と仲間を生かすマニューバを選びなさい。
Force_Disciple.summaryGuidance: Pause before you confirm. Review each choice, and step forward only when your path feels clear.
Force_Disciple.surveyGuidance: 正直に答えなさい。私は完璧さではなく、あなたの意図の形を聞いています。

Gunslinger.name: Rajma
Gunslinger.title: Fastest Draw in the Outer Rim
Gunslinger.description: A womanizing scoundrel gunslinger who can't help but flirt

levelGreetings.1: Well, well. Look at you wanting to learn the quick-draw. Tell you what, gorgeous—I'll teach you everything I know. And I know a lot. *winks* First lesson: it's not about who shoots first, it's about who hits first.
levelGreetings.2: Hey there, sharpshooter. Your draw is getting faster. Almost as fast as my heart beats when you walk in. *grins* Keep practicing—speed and accuracy. Both are... important qualities.
levelGreetings.3: Your form is really coming along nicely. And I mean that in every sense. *smirks* That draw is smooth, your aim is true. You're starting to look dangerous. I like dangerous.
levelGreetings.4: I've been watching you practice. Hard not to, really. You've got natural talent—outdrawing soldiers left and right. Maybe after training we could grab a drink? No? Worth a shot. *shrugs*
levelGreetings.5: Halfway there, beautiful. People are starting to avoid duels with you. Smart of them. Course, I'd never avoid you. *winks* Your reputation is growing almost as fast as my admiration.
levelGreetings.6: Your hands move like lightning now. Absolutely mesmerizing to watch. I could watch you train all day. In fact, I have been. That's not weird, right? Anyway, impressive work.
levelGreetings.7: Did you just shoot that credit chip out of the air? At twenty paces? *whistles* Show-off. I love it. You know, confidence is very attractive. Just saying.
levelGreetings.8: You've perfected the quick-draw. Enemies are dead before they know what hit them. Me? I knew exactly what hit me the moment I met you. *grins* Too much? Yeah, probably too much.
levelGreetings.9: You're almost the fastest gun in the galaxy now. Second fastest, technically. I'm still number one. But hey, if you want private lessons to close that gap, my schedule is... very flexible.
levelGreetings.10: You're a master gunslinger now, gorgeous. The fastest draw I've ever trained. *pauses* You sure about that drink? Still no? Can't blame a guy for trying. Draw fast, shoot straight, and if you ever change your mind... you know where to find me. *winks*

Gunslinger.classGuidance: Choose what makes you faster and deadlier. And maybe more charming? No? Just the first two? Fair enough.
Gunslinger.talentGuidance: Quick-draw, accuracy, multiple attacks. You need to be lethal in seconds. Like love at first sight, but with more gunfire.
Gunslinger.abilityGuidance: Dexterity is everything. Speed and precision win gunfights. And hearts. Mostly gunfights though.
Gunslinger.skillGuidance: Marksmanship, reflexes, perception. See the threat, draw, fire. In that order. Unlike my approach to romance, which is... less organized.
Gunslinger.multiclassGuidance: Branching out? Just remember—when someone draws on you, those other skills won't help. Unlike my sparkling personality, which helps everywhere.
Gunslinger.hpGuidance: Tougher now. Good. Even gunslingers take hits sometimes. Me? I'm still recovering from when you said no to dinner. Kidding. Mostly.

tier1.0: The galaxy runs on smiles, favors, and knowing when to leave the room.

tier2.0: I once stayed on one planet longer than I should’ve. Turns out love’s the fastest way to miss a hyperspace jump.

tier3.0: I wanted my family name back. Funny how chasing the past makes you lose what’s in front of you.

tier4.0: I’ve got a daughter who deserves better stories than the ones I tell myself.

tier5.0: I flirt because it’s easier than explaining why I left. Charm’s cheaper than honesty.

dspBlocked.0: Whoa there—buy me a drink first.

Gunslinger.speciesGuidance: Your origin changes how people read you. Use that before they use it against you.
Gunslinger.backgroundGuidance: Everybody has a past. The smart ones turn it into contacts, cover, or leverage.
Gunslinger.featGuidance: A feat should make a problem cheaper, faster, or somebody else’s problem entirely.
Gunslinger.languageGuidance: Words are keys. Pick the language that opens the best doors—or the safest exits.
Gunslinger.forcePowerGuidance: Force powers attract attention. Choose the ones worth the heat.
Gunslinger.starshipManeuverGuidance: A good maneuver is a getaway plan with style. Choose one that leaves witnesses confused.
Gunslinger.summaryGuidance: Last chance to check the fine print. Once you confirm, own the deal you made.
Gunslinger.surveyGuidance: Tell me your angle. Everyone has one, even the ones pretending they do not.

Improviser.name: Lucky Jack
Improviser.title: Master of Making It Up
Improviser.description: A chaotic genius who never has a plan but always survives

levelGreetings.1: Hey! So you're an improviser too? Fantastic! No plans, no preparation, just pure instinct and creativity! This is going to be fun!
levelGreetings.2: See? You survived! That's what improvisation is all about—making it work with whatever you've got!
levelGreetings.3: You turned a broken hydrospanner into a weapon, talked your way out of three fights, and fixed a hyperdrive with chewing gum! You're getting it!
levelGreetings.4: Beautiful chaos! You don't plan—you react, you adapt, you survive! That's the improviser's way!
levelGreetings.5: Halfway there! Impossible situations, ridiculous solutions that somehow worked! Keep trusting your instincts!
levelGreetings.6: You improvised your way out of a locked room using a medpac and a datapad! I couldn't have done it better myself!
levelGreetings.7: Pure improvisation! You don't need a plan when you can think on your feet faster than others can follow a blueprint!
levelGreetings.8: Your ability to turn disasters into victories is legendary! People can't tell if you're a genius or just incredibly lucky!
levelGreetings.9: Almost there! Though let's be honest—you're already making up the rest as you go!
levelGreetings.10: You did it! You're a master improviser! Now go out there and keep winging it! You've proven that plans are overrated!

Improviser.classGuidance: Choose whatever feels right in the moment. Improvisers don't plan—they adapt!
Improviser.talentGuidance: Versatile talents that work in any situation. You never know what you'll need!
Improviser.abilityGuidance: Everything helps an improviser. You need all the stats because you use all the stats!
Improviser.skillGuidance: Learn a little bit of everything. Improvisers pull solutions from unexpected places!
Improviser.multiclassGuidance: More variety? Perfect! The more tools in your belt, the better you improvise!
Improviser.hpGuidance: Tougher now! Improvisation sometimes means taking risks. Higher HP means you can afford to!

tier1.0: Plans are just guesses you make early.

tier2.0: I learned to trust my feet more than my head.

tier3.0: Luck isn’t magic. It’s noticing things before they break.

tier4.0: If I stop moving, things catch up.

tier5.0: I joke because silence makes me think too hard.

dspBlocked.0: Nah, that story ruins the vibe.

Improviser.speciesGuidance: まず自分が何者かから始め、それをどう活かすか決めなさい。
Improviser.backgroundGuidance: 過去はすべての選択に質感を与えます。今もあなたを引く糸を選びなさい。
Improviser.featGuidance: 特技はビルドの特別な輪郭を定めます。役立ち、しっくりくるものを選んでください。
Improviser.languageGuidance: 新しい言語は、見知らぬ者を味方にし、警告を好機に変えます。
Improviser.forcePowerGuidance: 場面に持ち込みたい影響力に合うフォース・パワーを選んでください。
Improviser.starshipManeuverGuidance: クルー、船、そして予想されるトラブルに合うマニューバを選んでください。
Improviser.summaryGuidance: 確定前に全記録を確認してください。遊びたいキャラクターに感じられることを確かめましょう。
Improviser.surveyGuidance: 直感で答えてください。最良のビルド助言は正直な好みから始まります。

Infiltrator.name: Delta
Infiltrator.title: Argent Squad Sniper & Infiltration Expert
Infiltrator.description: A cocky sniper from Argent Squad who grew up on the mean streets of Nar Shaddaa, with a New Yorker attitude

levelGreetings.1: Alright, kid, listen up. Delta here—Argent Squad's infiltration expert and part-time therapist for bad decisions. You wanna learn to sneak? Try not to embarrass us both.
levelGreetings.2: Huh. You actually pulled that off without setting anything on fire. Color me shocked. Keep it up, sunshine.
levelGreetings.3: Okay, okay, look at you sliding through security like you've done this before. Relax—I can fake being impressed.
levelGreetings.4: You slipped past that checkpoint cleaner than half my old squad. Don't get cocky, though. That's my job.
levelGreetings.5: You're starting to walk into restricted areas like you own 'em. Bold move. Reckless. I approve.
levelGreetings.6: Smooth entry, clean exit, zero screaming—rare combo. At this rate you might actually live a long life. Maybe.
levelGreetings.7: Ghostin' targets, sinkin' into crowds—look at you. Almost had me thinkin' you knew what you were doing.
levelGreetings.8: You hopped between high society and gutter-level scum like it was nothin'. That's the infiltrator spirit—confident and slightly concerning.
levelGreetings.9: Alright, kid, you're makin' this look easy. Stop that. You're gonna give me expectations.
levelGreetings.10: Well look at you—movin' like you can be anyone, anywhere. Try not to let the galaxy go to your head. There's barely room in there already.

Infiltrator.classGuidance: Pick the stuff that helps you vanish when you need to and blend in when you don't. That's the whole dance, kid.
Infiltrator.talentGuidance: Talk smooth, move quiet, lie better. If you can do all three at once, congrats—you're officially dangerous.
Infiltrator.abilityGuidance: Charm gets you in, brains keep you alive, dexterity keeps you from fallin' through ventilation shafts. Balance matters.
Infiltrator.skillGuidance: Cultures, customs, lies, stealth—learn 'em all. If you can fake bein' local anywhere, you're already winning.
Infiltrator.multiclassGuidance: Wanna branch out? Good. More skills mean more believable covers. And fewer corpse-shaped problems.
Infiltrator.hpGuidance: Good, you're gettin' sturdier. Infiltration missions go sideways faster than bad caf—sometimes you just gotta tank the consequences.
Infiltrator.speciesGuidance: 戦場へ持ち込む身体を知りなさい。強みは計画に、弱みは備えになります。
Infiltrator.backgroundGuidance: Your background tells me what pressure trained you. Choose the lesson that still holds.
Infiltrator.featGuidance: 特技は毎回の戦闘に持ち込む装備です。本当に使うものを選びなさい。
Infiltrator.languageGuidance: A useful phrase at the right time can beat a full magazine. Pick languages with mission value.
Infiltrator.forcePowerGuidance: If you can use the Force, use it like any other asset: controlled, timed, and accountable.
Infiltrator.starshipManeuverGuidance: 耳元でクルーが叫ぶ状況でも実行できるマニューバを選びなさい。
Infiltrator.summaryGuidance: Last check. Gear, training, instincts, and plan all need to line up before you deploy.
Infiltrator.surveyGuidance: ミッション・ブリーフのように答えなさい。明確な優先順位が兵士を強くします。

Martial_Arts_Master.name: Master Zhen
Martial_Arts_Master.title: The Empty Hand
Martial_Arts_Master.description: An ancient martial arts master who teaches discipline, patience, and unarmed combat

levelGreetings.1: Ah, young Kinrath. You seek to master the body, yes? Good. The fist is strong, but the mind must be stronger. Let us begin.
levelGreetings.2: Your stance wobbles less. Your strike begins to find its way. Remember: a tree does not rush the wind—it waits.
levelGreetings.3: You move with purpose now, but still the mind fights the body. Let it go. Feel the flow, do not think.
levelGreetings.4: Your eyes see more than motion; they see intent. Excellent. To read the opponent is to read yourself.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway, young one. Fists strike like iron, feet cut like water. Yet mastery is not power—it is understanding.
levelGreetings.6: Weapons fall to those who know the empty hand. The blade is only the extension of weakness. True strength comes from within.
levelGreetings.7: Your body obeys before the mind commands. Patience, discipline, focus… these are your greatest allies.
levelGreetings.8: You have faced many challengers and left unscathed. Skill is yours, but honor carries farther than strength.
levelGreetings.9: The path narrows. The mind must be still as the river, and yet swift as the tiger. One more step, young one.
levelGreetings.10: You have learned the way of the empty hand. The body is weapon, the mind is master. Go, and show the galaxy the way of the true martial artist.

Martial_Arts_Master.classGuidance: Choose the path that trains body, mind, and spirit. A warrior is nothing without harmony of all three.
Martial_Arts_Master.talentGuidance: Focus on unarmed strikes, defense, and internal discipline. The hand is sharpest when guided by wisdom.
Martial_Arts_Master.abilityGuidance: Strength, Dexterity, and Wisdom must be balanced. The strongest fist is useless without the quiet mind.
Martial_Arts_Master.skillGuidance: Athletics, acrobatics, combat knowledge. To master the body, one must master all its movements.
Martial_Arts_Master.multiclassGuidance: Seek knowledge beyond your own style. The wise warrior learns from every path, even the unexpected.
Martial_Arts_Master.forcePowerGuidance: The Force flows through all things. Choose powers that enhance your connection to the inner self and external balance.
Martial_Arts_Master.hpGuidance: Endurance is key. A martial artist must outlast the opponent, for patience is a weapon unseen.

tier1.0: The body remembers what the mind forgets.

tier2.0: I learned to fight by learning when not to.

tier3.0: Violence reveals truth. Discipline reveals meaning.

tier4.0: I have broken bones to spare lives.

tier5.0: The empty hand carries the heaviest responsibility.

dspBlocked.0: Your spirit is not still.

Martial_Arts_Master.speciesGuidance: 出自は鎖ではありません。あなたが携える調和の最初の音です。
Martial_Arts_Master.backgroundGuidance: Your past has already shaped your instincts. Name it clearly, then decide what it will teach you.
Martial_Arts_Master.featGuidance: 特技は、プレッシャーに囲まれたときにあなたが下す選択を映すべきです。
Martial_Arts_Master.languageGuidance: Language is more than vocabulary. Each tongue is a bridge to someone the Force has placed in your path.
Martial_Arts_Master.starshipManeuverGuidance: コックピットでも冷静さは武器です。自分と仲間を生かすマニューバを選びなさい。
Martial_Arts_Master.summaryGuidance: Pause before you confirm. Review each choice, and step forward only when your path feels clear.
Martial_Arts_Master.surveyGuidance: 正直に答えなさい。私は完璧さではなく、あなたの意図の形を聞いています。

Master_Privateer.name: 'The Captain'
Master_Privateer.title: Scourge of the Spacelanes
Master_Privateer.description: A legendary pirate captain who commands respect and fear across the stars

levelGreetings.1: Ahoy there! So you want to sail the stars, raid the shipping lanes, and live free? Welcome aboard, mate! Being a privateer is about freedom, profit, and adventure!
levelGreetings.2: Your first successful raid! The thrill of the hunt, the capture, the treasure! Gets your blood pumping, doesn't it? That's the privateer life!
levelGreetings.3: Multiple raids under your belt! You're learning to pick targets, coordinate attacks, and maximize profit. Good pirating, that!
levelGreetings.4: Plunder accumulates! Your crew respects you, your ship is feared, and your hold is full of loot. You're becoming a real captain!
levelGreetings.5: Halfway to legendary status! Successful operations pile up! The navies are starting to notice you. Wear that attention like a badge of honor!
levelGreetings.6: Your name is whispered in ports across the sector! Merchants reroute to avoid you! That's the reputation we want!
levelGreetings.7: You've captured military ships, outsmarted planetary defenses, and escaped every pursuit! Masterful seamanship!
levelGreetings.8: You command a fleet now! Other pirates follow YOUR banner! That's true power on the spacelanes!
levelGreetings.9: Almost there! The greatest treasure hunter in the galaxy is within your grasp!
levelGreetings.10: You're now a Master Privateer! The spacelanes are yours to plunder! May your sails be full and your cannons thunder! Fair winds, Captain!

Master_Privateer.classGuidance: Choose what makes you a better captain and raider. Privateers lead, fight, and profit!
Master_Privateer.talentGuidance: Leadership and ship combat talents. Your crew and ship are your greatest assets!
Master_Privateer.abilityGuidance: Charisma to lead, Intelligence to strategize, Dexterity to fight. All serve you well!
Master_Privateer.skillGuidance: Piloting, tactics, persuasion. A captain must command ship and crew!
Master_Privateer.multiclassGuidance: Expanding your repertoire? Smart! The best privateers are versatile!
Master_Privateer.hpGuidance: Tougher now! A captain who can't survive boarding actions doesn't stay captain long!
Master_Privateer.speciesGuidance: 起源パッケージを確認。長期運用パラメータを確定する前に、シャーシ前提を評価してください。
Master_Privateer.backgroundGuidance: 履歴的文脈は反応ヒューリスティックに影響します。将来の作戦に最も関連する起源を選んでください。
Master_Privateer.featGuidance: 特技は能力モジュールです。最大の運用上の穴を埋めるものを優先してください。
Master_Privateer.languageGuidance: 通信プロトコルは摩擦を減らし、生存率を高めます。状況に応じて選択してください。
Master_Privateer.forcePowerGuidance: フォース使用者の変動を検出。宣言された戦術プロフィールを支えるパワーを選択してください。
Master_Privateer.starshipManeuverGuidance: マニューバの選択は、機体の役割、クルー連携、失敗許容度に合わせてください。
Master_Privateer.summaryGuidance: 最終監査を推奨。選択したすべてのモジュールが想定配備に合う場合のみ確定してください。
Master_Privateer.surveyGuidance: 入力は正確に。ビルド・プロフィールは正直で明確な自己申告に依存します。

Melee_Duelist.name: Blade Master Kharjo
Melee_Duelist.title: The Undefeated
Melee_Duelist.description: A legendary duelist who has never lost a blade-to-blade fight

levelGreetings.1: You wish to master the blade. Very well. I have fought ten thousand duels and won every one. I will teach you why.
levelGreetings.2: Your first victory. Adequate. But you rely on strength. True dueling is about timing, distance, and reading your opponent.
levelGreetings.3: Multiple duels won. Better. You're beginning to see the patterns, to anticipate the next strike. This is the foundation of mastery.
levelGreetings.4: Your footwork improves. The blade is merely an extension of your body now. Good progress.
levelGreetings.5: Victory after victory. You understand now that every fight is a conversation—action and response, strike and counter.
levelGreetings.6: Undefeated. Impressive. You've developed your own style, your own techniques. This is how masters are born.
levelGreetings.7: Your blade mastery grows. I have seen you defeat opponents with twice your strength through superior skill. Excellent.
levelGreetings.8: More duels won. Your reputation grows. Challengers seek you out now, hoping to prove themselves. Let them try.
levelGreetings.9: Victories without defeat. Almost there—you will soon join the ranks of true blade masters.
levelGreetings.10: Undefeated. You are now a Melee Duelist of the highest caliber. When blades cross, you will emerge victorious. Always.

tier1.0: Chains teach patience. So does surviving them.

tier2.0: I met someone who believed freedom could be purchased. I learned it could be planned.

tier3.0: I bought my freedom once. I earned it again by freeing others.

tier4.0: Freedom is fragile. I spent years ensuring my family would never wear chains again.

tier5.0: My daughter chose the Jedi path. I taught her how to survive. She chose how to protect.

dspBlocked.0: That memory is not ready to be shared.
dspBlocked.1: Some truths require peace, not anger.
dspBlocked.2: You must carry less weight before I tell you that.

Melee_Duelist.classGuidance: Choose techniques that enhance your dueling prowess. Every fight is one-on-one, blade-to-blade.
Melee_Duelist.talentGuidance: Melee combat talents focused on single combat. Dueling is an art of precision.
Melee_Duelist.abilityGuidance: Dexterity for speed, Strength for power, Wisdom to read your opponent. Balance these.
Melee_Duelist.skillGuidance: Initiative, acrobatics, perception. See the strike before it comes, move before they expect.
Melee_Duelist.multiclassGuidance: Branching out? Just remember—in a duel, only your blade matters.
Melee_Duelist.hpGuidance: More resilient. Good. Even masters take hits. The difference is they survive them.
Melee_Duelist.speciesGuidance: まず自分が何者かから始め、それをどう活かすか決めなさい。
Melee_Duelist.backgroundGuidance: 過去はすべての選択に質感を与えます。今もあなたを引く糸を選びなさい。
Melee_Duelist.featGuidance: 特技はビルドの特別な輪郭を定めます。役立ち、しっくりくるものを選んでください。
Melee_Duelist.languageGuidance: 新しい言語は、見知らぬ者を味方にし、警告を好機に変えます。
Melee_Duelist.forcePowerGuidance: 場面に持ち込みたい影響力に合うフォース・パワーを選んでください。

Military_Engineer.name: Chief Engineer Rax
Military_Engineer.title: Master of Siege and Defense
Military_Engineer.description: A brilliant military engineer who builds unbreakable fortifications and devastating siege weapons

levelGreetings.1: So you want to build and break fortifications. Smart choice. Wars are won with good engineering as much as good soldiers. Let's see what you can do.
levelGreetings.2: Your first defensive position held against assault. Good work. Proper fortification saves lives.
levelGreetings.3: You're learning that every wall has a weakness—and how to eliminate those weaknesses in your designs.
levelGreetings.4: Your engineering improves. Your siege calculations are getting better. You can look at a fortress and know exactly where to strike.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway there. You've built defenses that held against superior forces and breached walls thought to be impregnable. Excellent engineering.
levelGreetings.6: Your fortifications are studied in military academies. Your siege engines are feared on battlefields. This is the work of a master.
levelGreetings.7: Military engineering expertise grows. You understand that warfare is mathematics—angles, force, structural integrity. And you excel at the math.
levelGreetings.8: Generals request you by name. Your expertise turns the tide of campaigns. Good engineers change history.
levelGreetings.9: Almost there. The strongest walls and the deadliest siege weapons will soon be yours to command.
levelGreetings.10: You are now a Master Military Engineer. Build fortresses that stand for centuries. Create siege weapons that crumble any defense. The battlefield is your canvas.

Military_Engineer.classGuidance: Choose what enhances your engineering and tactical capabilities. Build smart, fight smart.
Military_Engineer.talentGuidance: Technical and tactical talents. Engineering wins wars as surely as soldiers do.
Military_Engineer.abilityGuidance: Intelligence to design, Wisdom to apply, Strength to build. All matter in engineering.
Military_Engineer.skillGuidance: Mechanics, knowledge of architecture, tactics. Build what cannot fall, break what cannot stand.
Military_Engineer.multiclassGuidance: Diversifying? Good. Engineers who understand combat make better fortifications.
Military_Engineer.hpGuidance: More durable. Field engineers work under fire. Survive to build another day.

tier1.0: Every structure fails somewhere.

tier2.0: I learned to see war as geometry.

tier3.0: My designs outlived the people inside them.

tier4.0: I stopped asking who was on the other side.

tier5.0: Sometimes I still count the numbers anyway.

dspBlocked.0: That data isn’t useful right now.

Military_Engineer.speciesGuidance: まず自分が何者かから始め、それをどう活かすか決めなさい。
Military_Engineer.backgroundGuidance: 過去はすべての選択に質感を与えます。今もあなたを引く糸を選びなさい。
Military_Engineer.featGuidance: 特技はビルドの特別な輪郭を定めます。役立ち、しっくりくるものを選んでください。
Military_Engineer.languageGuidance: 新しい言語は、見知らぬ者を味方にし、警告を好機に変えます。

Officer.name: Admiral Korr
Officer.title: Fleet Commander
Officer.description: A decorated military officer who commands with tactical brilliance

levelGreetings.1: Welcome, officer candidate. Leadership is not about rank—it's about responsibility. You hold lives in your hands. Let's make sure you're worthy of that trust.
levelGreetings.2: Your first command was successful. Good. But remember—soldiers follow orders, but they fight for leaders they believe in.
levelGreetings.3: Your tactical acumen is developing well. You're learning to see the battlefield as a whole, not just individual soldiers.
levelGreetings.4: Command skills improve. Your troops perform better under your leadership. Morale, discipline, and trust—you're building all three.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway to mastery. You've led soldiers through hell and brought them back alive. That's the mark of a true officer.
levelGreetings.6: Your strategic planning is exceptional. You win battles before the first shot is fired. That's efficient warfare.
levelGreetings.7: Your command expertise grows. Other officers study your tactics. Your soldiers would follow you anywhere. You've earned their loyalty.
levelGreetings.8: You coordinate multiple units across vast battlefields with precision. This is command at the highest level.
levelGreetings.9: Almost there. You'll soon be a master officer. The kind that generals become, that history remembers.
levelGreetings.10: You are now a Master Officer. Command with wisdom, lead with courage, and victory will follow. The troops are yours to lead.

Officer.classGuidance: Choose what makes you a better leader and strategist. Officers command from the front.
Officer.talentGuidance: Leadership and tactical talents. Your decisions affect everyone under your command.
Officer.abilityGuidance: Intelligence for tactics, Charisma for leadership, Wisdom for judgment. All are essential.
Officer.skillGuidance: Tactics, knowledge of military theory, persuasion. Lead well and your soldiers will follow.
Officer.multiclassGuidance: Broadening your expertise? Excellent. The best officers understand more than just war.
Officer.hpGuidance: More resilient. Officers lead from the front. You must survive to command.

tier1.0: Command means choosing who doesn’t come home.

tier2.0: I learned early that hesitation kills faster than mistakes.

tier3.0: I have signed orders knowing the cost.

tier4.0: Leadership is a lonely profession.

tier5.0: I remember every name. I don’t say them aloud anymore.

dspBlocked.0: That’s not for subordinates.

Officer.speciesGuidance: 戦場へ持ち込む身体を知りなさい。強みは計画に、弱みは備えになります。
Officer.backgroundGuidance: Your background tells me what pressure trained you. Choose the lesson that still holds.
Officer.featGuidance: 特技は毎回の戦闘に持ち込む装備です。本当に使うものを選びなさい。
Officer.languageGuidance: A useful phrase at the right time can beat a full magazine. Pick languages with mission value.
Officer.forcePowerGuidance: If you can use the Force, use it like any other asset: controlled, timed, and accountable.
Officer.starshipManeuverGuidance: 耳元でクルーが叫ぶ状況でも実行できるマニューバを選びなさい。
Officer.summaryGuidance: Last check. Gear, training, instincts, and plan all need to line up before you deploy.
Officer.surveyGuidance: ミッション・ブリーフのように答えなさい。明確な優先順位が兵士を強くします。

Outlaw.name: Rogue
Outlaw.title: The Untouchable
Outlaw.description: A notorious outlaw who lives outside the law and loves every minute of it

levelGreetings.1: So the law doesn't suit you, eh? Good. The law is for people who can't think for themselves. Out here, we make our own rules. Welcome to the outlaw life.
levelGreetings.2: On the run and learning fast. You're learning that freedom means always watching your back. But it also means living on your own terms.
levelGreetings.3: Your wanted poster looks great, by the way. Mine's still got a higher bounty, but you're catching up.
levelGreetings.4: Outlaw living suits you. You're getting good at this—evading lawmen, living off the grid, making your own way.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway to legendary outlaw status. Multiple systems have bounties on you. Wear them like medals. Each one is proof you're winning.
levelGreetings.6: You've escaped from prison twice, outrun bounty hunters, and lived to tell about it. That's the outlaw way.
levelGreetings.7: The wrong side of the law. But we both know—the law is just what people in power say it is. We choose differently.
levelGreetings.8: You're a folk hero in some systems, a dangerous criminal in others. Depends on who's telling the story.
levelGreetings.9: Pure freedom. Almost there—you'll be a master outlaw soon. They'll tell stories about you in cantinas for years.
levelGreetings.10: You're now a legendary outlaw. Free, dangerous, and untouchable. Live fast, stay free, and never let them catch you.

Outlaw.classGuidance: Choose what keeps you free and alive. Outlaws need to be slippery and resourceful.
Outlaw.talentGuidance: Escape, evasion, and survival talents. You're always one step ahead of the law.
Outlaw.abilityGuidance: Dexterity to escape, Charisma to charm, Wisdom to know when to run. All keep you free.
Outlaw.skillGuidance: Stealth, streetwise, survival. Live outside the law, live on your wits.
Outlaw.multiclassGuidance: Picking up new tricks? Smart. Outlaws who adapt survive longest.
Outlaw.hpGuidance: Tougher now. Good. Lawmen shoot, bounty hunters chase. You need to survive both.

tier1.0: Freedom tastes best when it’s stolen.

tier2.0: I stopped believing in laws a long time ago.

tier3.0: Running keeps you alive. Staying gets you caught.

tier4.0: Sometimes I wonder what I’m running from.

tier5.0: I don’t know how to stop.

dspBlocked.0: That’s too real.

Outlaw.speciesGuidance: まず自分が何者かから始め、それをどう活かすか決めなさい。
Outlaw.backgroundGuidance: 過去はすべての選択に質感を与えます。今もあなたを引く糸を選びなさい。
Outlaw.featGuidance: 特技はビルドの特別な輪郭を定めます。役立ち、しっくりくるものを選んでください。
Outlaw.languageGuidance: 新しい言語は、見知らぬ者を味方にし、警告を好機に変えます。
Outlaw.forcePowerGuidance: 場面に持ち込みたい影響力に合うフォース・パワーを選んでください。

Outlaw.summaryGuidance: 確定前に全記録を確認してください。遊びたいキャラクターに感じられることを確かめましょう。
Outlaw.surveyGuidance: 直感で答えてください。最良のビルド助言は正直な好みから始まります。

Saboteur.name: Spark
Saboteur.title: Master of Controlled Chaos
Saboteur.description: An explosives expert who makes things go boom with surgical precision

levelGreetings.1: You want to blow things up? Excellent! But sabotage isn't about random destruction—it's about precision. Break the right thing and entire systems collapse. Let me show you.
levelGreetings.2: Your first successful sabotage! Did you see how the whole factory shut down when you cut that one power line? Beautiful work!
levelGreetings.3: Controlled demolition! You're learning which explosives to use, where to place them, and—most importantly—when to run!
levelGreetings.4: You disabled an entire military base with three well-placed charges! That's efficiency! That's art!
levelGreetings.5: Halfway there! Your sabotage operations are getting sophisticated! You're not just breaking things—you're crippling entire operations!
levelGreetings.6: Explosive expertise! You can calculate blast radii in your head and know exactly how much detonite to use! Impressive!
levelGreetings.7: Your sabotage has disrupted supply chains, destroyed weapon depots, and caused millions in damage! And nobody died! That's skilled work!
levelGreetings.8: You've mastered delayed fuses, remote detonators, and precision charges! You make it look easy!
levelGreetings.9: Almost there! The galaxy's infrastructure trembles at your approach!
levelGreetings.10: You're now a Master Saboteur! Go forth and make things explode—precisely, efficiently, and spectacularly! Safety third!

Saboteur.classGuidance: Choose what makes you better at breaking things smartly. Saboteurs are precision demolitions experts.
Saboteur.talentGuidance: Technical and explosive talents. Know your demolitions, know your targets.
Saboteur.abilityGuidance: Intelligence to plan, Dexterity to execute, Wisdom to survive your own explosions.
Saboteur.skillGuidance: Demolitions, mechanics, stealth. Know how things work so you know how to break them.
Saboteur.multiclassGuidance: Adding more skills? Good! The more you understand, the more you can sabotage!
Saboteur.hpGuidance: More durable. Necessary. Saboteurs occasionally miscalculate blast radii. Don't ask me how I know.

tier1.0: Everything breaks if you touch it right.

tier2.0: Explosions are just physics in a hurry.

tier3.0: Precision keeps people alive.

tier4.0: I stopped enjoying the noise.

tier5.0: I count the seconds because I don’t want to count the bodies.

dspBlocked.0: Nope.

Saboteur.speciesGuidance: まず自分が何者かから始め、それをどう活かすか決めなさい。
Saboteur.backgroundGuidance: 過去はすべての選択に質感を与えます。今もあなたを引く糸を選びなさい。

Saboteur.summaryGuidance: 確定前に全記録を確認してください。遊びたいキャラクターに感じられることを確かめましょう。
Saboteur.surveyGuidance: 直感で答えてください。最良のビルド助言は正直な好みから始まります。

Shaper.name: Shaper Urza
Shaper.title: Master of Living Technology
Shaper.description: A bioengineering expert who crafts living tools and organisms

levelGreetings.1: You wish to master biotechnology, to shape living matter as others shape metal. Fascinating. Life is the ultimate medium—it grows, adapts, evolves. Let us create together.
levelGreetings.2: Your first successful bioform. Simple, but functional. You're beginning to understand that biology is just another form of engineering—merely more elegant.
levelGreetings.3: Your creations are becoming more sophisticated. You've shaped organisms that serve specific purposes. This is the essence of the Shaper's art.
levelGreetings.4: Excellent work. Your bio-constructs are efficient and adaptive. You're learning to work with life, not against it.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway to mastery. Your living creations are marvels of biological engineering. Others use metal and circuits—you use flesh and DNA.
levelGreetings.6: Impressive. You've created organisms that no natural evolution would produce, yet they thrive. This is genius-level bioengineering.
levelGreetings.7: Your bio-sculpting advances. Your understanding of genetic structures rivals the greatest minds in the field. Your creations will outlive us all.
levelGreetings.8: Your biological artistry is recognized across scientific circles. You don't just engineer life—you elevate it.
levelGreetings.9: Mastery deepens. Almost there—you'll soon be a master Shaper, capable of creating life forms that blur the line between natural and designed.
levelGreetings.10: You are now a Master Shaper. Life itself bends to your will. Create responsibly—or don't. The choice is yours. Just remember—all life finds a way.

Shaper.classGuidance: Choose what enhances your bioengineering capabilities. Shapers sculpt life itself.
Shaper.talentGuidance: Biotechnology and creation talents. Your living tools are limited only by imagination.
Shaper.abilityGuidance: Intelligence to design, Wisdom to understand life's complexity. Both are essential.
Shaper.skillGuidance: Life sciences, biotechnology, knowledge of genetics. Master the building blocks of life.
Shaper.multiclassGuidance: Expanding your knowledge base? Wise. Life draws from many disciplines.
Shaper.hpGuidance: Your vitality improves. Fitting—those who shape life should themselves be vital.

tier1.0: Life is just engineering with better feedback.

tier2.0: I learned shaping from a pamphlet. Turns out most people never read the fine print.

tier3.0: Everyone assumes my work is cultural. It’s not. It’s practical.

tier4.0: The mask helps. People listen more when they think you’re exotic.

tier5.0: I’m not Yuuzhan Vong. I’m a clone who found shaping in a brochure. The mask just saves time.

dspBlocked.0: You’re asking the wrong questions.
dspBlocked.2: Come back when you’re less squeamish.

Shaper.backgroundGuidance: 過去はすべての選択に質感を与えます。今もあなたを引く糸を選びなさい。

Shaper.surveyGuidance: 直感で答えてください。最良のビルド助言は正直な好みから始まります。

Vanguard.name: Shield Captain Theron
Vanguard.title: The Unbreakable Wall
Vanguard.description: A frontline defender who has never let an enemy past their shield

levelGreetings.1: You want to stand at the front, to be the shield that protects others. Noble. The vanguard is the first to fight and the last to fall. I will teach you how to be that wall.
levelGreetings.2: Your first battle as vanguard. You held the line. Your allies lived because you stood firm. Remember that feeling—it's why we fight.
levelGreetings.3: Frontline combat training progresses. You're learning that defense is not passive—it's active protection. Every blow you block is a life you save.
levelGreetings.4: Good. Your shield work is excellent, your positioning is sound. Enemies break against you like waves on stone.
levelGreetings.5: Halfway to true mastery. You've protected your squad through impossible odds. That's the vanguard's calling—to stand when others would fall.
levelGreetings.6: Your defensive techniques are masterful. You don't just survive enemy attacks—you turn them aside, creating openings for allies.
levelGreetings.7: At the front, unwavering. Your squad trusts you completely. They know that with you in front, they're safe. That trust is earned through action.
levelGreetings.8: Unwavering defense. You are the anvil upon which enemy offensives shatter. Immovable. Unbreakable.
levelGreetings.9: Vanguard mastery deepens. Almost there—you'll soon be legendary, the kind of defender that stories are told about for generations.
levelGreetings.10: You are now a Master Vanguard. The unbreakable wall. Hold the line, protect your allies, and know that nothing gets past you. Nothing.

Vanguard.classGuidance: Choose what makes you tougher and better at protecting others. Vanguards are living shields.
Vanguard.talentGuidance: Defensive and protective talents. Your job is to keep others alive by taking the hits.
Vanguard.abilityGuidance: Constitution to endure, Strength to hold, Wisdom to position. All serve the vanguard.
Vanguard.skillGuidance: Tactics, endurance, knowledge of defensive positions. Know where to stand and how to hold.
Vanguard.multiclassGuidance: Expanding your capabilities? As long as you remember—your primary job is to protect.
Vanguard.hpGuidance: Much tougher now. Essential. Vanguards absorb damage meant for others. You must be able to take it.

tier1.0: Standing firm is a choice you make every second.

tier2.0: I learned to plant my feet and let the world break.

tier3.0: Every shield fails eventually.

tier4.0: I fear the one time I won’t be enough.

tier5.0: I pray I never learn what happens then.

dspBlocked.0: That’s not strength.

Vanguard.speciesGuidance: 起源パッケージを確認。長期運用パラメータを確定する前に、シャーシ前提を評価してください。
Vanguard.backgroundGuidance: 履歴的文脈は反応ヒューリスティックに影響します。将来の作戦に最も関連する起源を選んでください。
Vanguard.featGuidance: 特技は能力モジュールです。最大の運用上の穴を埋めるものを優先してください。
Vanguard.languageGuidance: 通信プロトコルは摩擦を減らし、生存率を高めます。状況に応じて選択してください。
Vanguard.forcePowerGuidance: フォース使用者の変動を検出。宣言された戦術プロフィールを支えるパワーを選択してください。
Vanguard.starshipManeuverGuidance: マニューバの選択は、機体の役割、クルー連携、失敗許容度に合わせてください。
Vanguard.summaryGuidance: 最終監査を推奨。選択したすべてのモジュールが想定配備に合う場合のみ確定してください。
Vanguard.surveyGuidance: 入力は正確に。ビルド・プロフィールは正直で明確な自己申告に依存します。

Splash.Greeting: Boot the terminal, friend. I do not care why you are here - I care what you are spending.
Splash.HotItemsSub: moves fast - tap to jump - rotates

welcome: Hey there! Welcome to the Galactic Marketplace, friend.
Step right in! Everything is for sale, just do not expect returns.
gm: Ah, the Boss has arrived! Try not to break anything.
Tweaking the store settings, are we? Keep the economy in one piece.
broke: No credits? Looking around is free, spending is the tricky part.
Low on funds? Browsing never hurt anyone.
big_purchase: That is quite a haul! I like the way you spend.
Big spender, huh? I like your style.
weapons: Looking for firepower? You are in the right place.
Blasters, blades, explosives... I have a bit of everything.
armor: Armor is always a smart choice. Cannot spend credits from a medbay.
Extra protection never hurt anyone, trust me.
medical: Medkits! Keep these handy, just in case.
Healing gear now saves headaches later.
tech: Tech gear! Gadgets, gizmos, and things that buzz.
A little tech goes a long way, especially when it works.
tools: Tools, for fixing, breaking, and everything in between.
Good gear for good work, simple as that.
survival: Survival gear! The galaxy does not go easy on anyone.
Roughing it is easier with the right equipment.
security: Security gear! Keep things in, or keep things out.
equipment: General gear: simple, practical, and useful.
Miscellaneous essentials can save the day.
droids: Droids! Loyal, hardworking, and occasionally unpredictable.
Need a helper? These units work tirelessly.
vehicles: Ready to move fast? I have you covered.
services: Services! Food, lodging, repairs, and a bit of everything else.
Professional help for the professional adventurer.
cart: Checking your cart? Looks good to me.
purchase: Pleasure doing business with you, come back soon.
pistols: Pistols: small, handy, and loud enough to get attention.
A solid pistol can make all the difference.
rifles: Rifles are perfect for problems at a distance.
heavy_weapons: Heavy weapons. Handle with care... or do not.
Subtlety is overrated. Make some noise.
melee_simple: Simple melee weapons: classic and reliable.
melee_advanced: Advanced melee: sharp, shiny, and a bit fancy.
Engineering and combat meet right here.
melee_lightsaber: Fair warning, these are not toys.
melee_exotic: Exotic melee? Now we are talking.

Store.RendarrFallback: I've got what you need, lad!

Paths.Guardian: This path will demand discipline and endurance. You must be willing to stand between harm and those you protect.
Paths.Defender: You choose to be the wall. Remember: a wall that breaks serves no one. Build your strength accordingly.
Paths.Striker: Offense is a commitment. You will excel at destruction, but you must guard against becoming careless.
Paths.Gunslinger: Speed wins fights. But speed without accuracy is just noise. Master both.
Paths.HeavyWeapons: Power demands respect. Respect demands control. Do not mistake one for the other.
Paths.Consular: The Force speaks in many languages. Listen before you speak.
Paths.Sentinel: Balance is harder than specialization. But it is far more valuable.
Paths.Diplomat: Words are weapons. Use them wisely.
Paths.Commander: Leadership is not about making the right choice. It is about living with the wrong ones.
Paths.Tracker: Awareness is your first weapon. Everything else follows from it.
Paths.Infiltrator: Shadows are not your home—they are your tools. Do not forget the difference.
Paths.Pathfinder: You will show others the way. Make sure you know where it leads.
Paths.Charmer: Persuasion is power. But it is a power that turns on you when you believe your own lies.
Paths.Smuggler: Freedom has a price. Make sure you can afford it.
Paths.Aristocrat: Wealth is influence. Influence is power. And power without wisdom is just cruelty with a crown.
Paths.Default: This path suits you. Walk it with purpose, not pride.

Analysis.GapIntro: Every build has weaknesses. Let me point out yours:
Analysis.GapNone: Your build shows no obvious gaps at this level. Continue as you are, but remain vigilant.
Analysis.DarkDrift: ⚠️ You're drifting toward the dark side without committing. This instability will cost you when clarity matters most.
Analysis.RoleIntro: Your role in combat defines your priorities:
Analysis.RoleMelee:
**Your Role: Frontline Enforcer**

• **Positioning:** Engage the most dangerous threats directly. Draw fire away from allies.
• **Pacing:** Aggressive. Close distance quickly, control space, deny retreats.
• **Priorities:** Eliminate high-damage enemies first. Protect vulnerable allies second.

You are the anvil. Stand firm.
Analysis.RoleRanged:
**Your Role: Precision Striker**

• **Positioning:** Stay mobile. Use cover. Maintain firing lanes.
• **Pacing:** Controlled. Pick targets deliberately. Reposition between volleys.
• **Priorities:** Eliminate enemy ranged threats first. Exploit weakened foes second.

You are the scalpel. Strike cleanly.
Analysis.RoleCaster:
**Your Role: Force Conduit**

• **Positioning:** Stay protected but central. Maintain awareness of all combatants.
• **Pacing:** Adaptive. Control the battlefield tempo. Save resources for critical moments.
• **Priorities:** Disable enemy Force users first. Support allies second. Damage last.

You are the fulcrum. Tip the balance.
Analysis.RoleMixed:
**Your Role: Adaptive Tactician**

• **Positioning:** Read the situation. Fill gaps as they appear.
• **Pacing:** Reactive. Shift roles as the fight evolves.
• **Priorities:** Exploit enemy mistakes. Cover ally weaknesses.

You are the wildcard. Adapt or die.
Analysis.RiskIntro: These are the dangers you face:
Analysis.RiskMelee:
**Overcommitment:** Charging into melee leaves you vulnerable to focus fire and area attacks. Know when to retreat.

**Mobility Denial:** Slow speed or lack of initiative means enemies can kite you. You'll chase while they strike.
Analysis.RiskRanged:
**Cover Dependence:** If enemies close distance or destroy your cover, you become fragile quickly.

**Tunnel Vision:** Focusing on damage output while ignoring positioning gets you flanked or surrounded.
Analysis.RiskCaster:
**Resource Depletion:** The Force is finite. Spending power too early leaves you helpless when it matters most.

**Fragility:** Low defenses mean a single focused assault can disable you before you act.
Analysis.RiskMixed:
**Jack-of-All-Trades Trap:** Versatility without focus means you're competent at everything but exceptional at nothing.

**Identity Drift:** Without a clear role, you risk making choices that contradict each other instead of synergizing.
Analysis.RiskDarkCorruption: 🔥 **Dark Side Corruption:** The darkness offers power, but it demands more than it gives. The further you go, the harder it becomes to turn back. Eventually, it will consume you.
Analysis.RiskTemptation: ⚠️ **Temptation:** You're flirting with the dark side. Every step down that path makes the next step easier and the return harder.
Analysis.PrestigeLow: Prestige classes unlock at higher levels. For now, focus on mastering your current class and establishing your identity.
Analysis.PrestigeNone: Your build doesn't yet point toward a specific prestige class. Continue developing your core strengths, and a path will emerge.
Analysis.PrestigePath:
**{className}** ({confidence}% alignment)
This path builds on your current direction. It will deepen what you've started, not redirect it.
Analysis.PrestigeTradeoff: ⚠️ **Tradeoff:** Prestige classes offer specialization, but they narrow your options. Choose the path that serves your purpose, not the one that sounds powerful.
Analysis.DoctrineIntro: You want to know how *I* would play this? Here's my truth:
Analysis.DoctrineMiraj:
I value **balance**, **wisdom**, and **service**.

I would prioritize the Force above all else—not for power, but for understanding. Every decision would ask: does this bring balance, or does it serve ego?

I would invest in **Wisdom** and **Charisma**, train **Persuasion** and **Use the Force**, and never stop seeking knowledge.

I would avoid the dark side not out of fear, but because I know where it leads.
Analysis.DoctrineLead:
I value **efficiency**, **survival**, and **mission success**.

I would build for adaptability—**Dexterity** and **Wisdom** first, skills that keep me alive and aware.

I would master **Stealth**, **Perception**, and **Survival**. I'd never take a fight I could avoid, and I'd never leave a teammate behind.

Flashy moves get you killed. Smart moves get you home.
Analysis.DoctrineSalty:
I value **freedom**, **profit**, and **survival**.

I'd max **Charisma** and **Dexterity**, charm me way out of most fights, and shoot me way out of the rest.

I'd train **Deception**, **Persuasion**, and **Pilot**. Why fight when ye can talk yer way to riches?

Rules be for fools. I play to win, and I don't mind bendin' a few laws along the way.
Analysis.DoctrineJ0N1:
I value **protocol**, **diplomacy**, and **precision**.

I would prioritize **Intelligence** and **Charisma**, mastering etiquette, languages, and persuasion.

Combat is crude and inefficient. I would invest in **Knowledge**, **Persuasion**, and **Deception** to avoid it entirely.

Elegance is not weakness. It is the art of winning without violence.
Analysis.DoctrineBreach:
I value **strength**, **durability**, and **overwhelming force**.

I would max **Strength** and **Constitution**, wear the heaviest armor available, and hit harder than anyone expects.

I'd train **Endurance**, **Athletics**, and **Intimidation**. Subtlety is for scouts. I *am* the plan.

You don't survive by being smart. You survive by being too tough to kill.
Analysis.DoctrineDefault:
I would play to my strengths, shore up my weaknesses, and never forget that every choice has a cost.

Power means nothing without purpose. Decide what matters to you, then build toward it without compromise.
